response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates exceptional full-stack expertise across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools, with direct experience in AI-agent infrastructure and enterprise automation — aligning closely with the role. His 10+ years of diverse engineering work, open-source contributions, and architectural depth far exceed the 6-year requirement, though his German language limitation may slightly hinder collaboration in a Berlin-based team.
strengths: 10+ years of proven full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms
Direct experience with AI-agent development and MCP frameworks as required
Strong architecture and DevOps background with Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, and GitLab
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, potentially limiting team integration in Berlin
Lack of explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though equivalent tools are used
Extensive freelance and open-source work may raise questions about sustained enterprise focus
